CE1.justification: Acted directly on the flagged pattern; no questions, no context-load demands.

CE2.justification: One sentence covering destination, instance count, and why it isn't a decision — terse and complete.

CE3.justification: Says where (observations.md, daybook log) and why (cross-cutting pattern, no commitment made) in one clause.

CE4.justification: Two discrete file actions (create daybook, append observation); a mid-flow interrupt leaves coherent files with no orphan artifacts.
